hero_title.title: Hero Title
hero_title.default: Shoes that last as long as

hero_subtitle.title: Hero Subtitle
hero_subtitle.default: Durable, comfortable footwear built for real life — from school runs to shop floors. Nepal-made quality at prices that make sense.

why_heading.title: Why Heading
why_heading.default: Footwear that earns its place in your day.

default.title: Built to last
default.desc: Durable construction that handles Nepal's streets, monsoons, and daily grind without falling apart.

default.title: Comfortable fit
default.desc: Practical materials and proven patterns designed for all-day wear — school, work, everywhere.

default.title: Made in Nepal
default.desc: Local production means faster restocking, competitive pricing, and shoes built for local conditions.

buyers_heading.title: Buyers Heading
buyers_heading.default: Whether you stock shelves or buy direct — we make it easy.

default.title: Retail shops
default.desc: Consistent size runs, clean labels, and reliable batch supply that keeps your shelves stocked.

default.title: Supermarkets
default.desc: Display-ready packaging, organized pricing, and production records for easy aisle management.

default.title: Direct buyers
default.desc: Quality daily footwear at factory prices — for schools, offices, and families who value durability.

proof_heading.title: Proof Heading
proof_heading.default: Quality you can see. Supply you can count on.

proof_points.title: Proof Points
default: Consistent batches you can reorder with confidence
Organized dispatch with full production records

dispatch_card_text.title: Dispatch Card Text
dispatch_card_text.default: Every pair leaves with labels, records, and quality checks complete.
